title: Storyboard · "Knock" — Radio→Animation production script · S7
body:
**Scene 7: 07:00–08:30 · The Letter on the Table**

HERO FRAME: Close on a small piece of stationery on a doily-covered side table · Grace's handwriting in fountain-pen ink: "It is not your fault." · a half-drunk cup of tea beside it · a brooch and a folded pair of reading glasses

MOTION: kling — soft afternoon light slowly creeps across the note from left to right. The teacup's surface trembles once. The glasses catch a glint.

MOOD: Tender unbearable.

AUDIO: Walter: *"She left a note on her table. Not a letter — just a note. It said: 'It is not your fault.' I have read that note many times."*

source.label: Dimension X episode #05 (NBC Radio, May 6, 1950) adapting Fredric Brown's 1948 short-short story "Knock" (originally in *Thrilling Wonder Stories*, December 1948)

author: matt

witnesses.label: Rufinus of Aquileia, Commentary on the Apostles' Creed (c. AD 404)
Pirminius, De singulis libris canonicis scarapsus (c. AD 750) — earliest received form
Cited by every major catechism since 8th century
